ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storms" (
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the storm occurred */,
  "storm_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm */,
  "storm_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the storm (e.g., tropical depression, tropical storm, hurricane) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Windspeed of the storm */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the storm */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities caused by the storm */,
  "damages" REAL /* Damages caused by the storm in USD */,
  "storm_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the storm first formed */,
  "storm_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the storm dissipated */,
  "storm_track" TEXT /* A string or JSON representation of the storm's path */,
  "storm_intensity_changes" TEXT /* A string or JSON representation of changes in intensity over time */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the storm data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the storm data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storms_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storms_storm_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_category_id") REFERENCES storm_categories ("storm_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the storms occurred */,
  "td_count" INTEGER /* Number of tropical depressions in the year */,
  "ts_count" INTEGER /* Number of tropical storms in the year */,
  "hu_count" INTEGER /* Number of hurricanes in the year */,
  "mh_count" INTEGER /* Number of major hurricanes in the year */,
  "strongest_storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strongest storm of the year */,
  "total_storms" INTEGER /* Total number of storms in the year */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities in the year */,
  "total_damages" REAL /* Total damages in USD in the year */,
  "average_windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed of storms in the year */,
  "average_pressure" REAL /* Average pressure of storms in the year */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the year data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the year data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_categories" (
  "storm_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm category */,
  "storm_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm category (e.g., tropical depression, tropical storm, hurricane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storm category */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the storm category data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the storm category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storm_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damages" (
  "damage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage record */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm that caused the damage */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., property, infrastructure, agriculture) */,
  "damage_amount" REAL /* Amount of damage in USD */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the damage occurred */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the damage data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the damage data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damages_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm that caused the fatality */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "fatality_cause" TEXT /* Cause of fatalities (e.g., flooding, wind, storm surge) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the fatalities occurred */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the fatality data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the fatality data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON representation of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the storm data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the storm data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the access log data to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the access log data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
